Headline: #119 Michigan/119th Temporary Reroute at 119th/Normal
ShortDescription: #119 Michigan/119th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 119th, Halsted, 115th, Wentworth and 119th due to construction near 119th/Normal.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#119 Michigan/119th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 119th, Halsted, 115th, Wentworth and 119th, then will resume their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to construction near 119th/Normal.

Headline: #8 Halsted Temporary Reroute at Halsted/16th
ShortDescription: #8 Halsted buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Halsted, Roosevelt, Morgan, 16th and Halsted due to localized flooding near Halsted/16th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#8 Halsted buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Halsted, Roosevelt, Morgan, 16th, then resume their normal route on Halsted.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to localized flooding near Halsted/16th.

Headline: Southbound #6 Jackson Park Express Temporary Southbound Reroute near Balbo/State to Wabash
ShortDescription: SB #6 Jackson Park Exp buses are rrtd via State, Harrison, Michigan, & Balbo, then resume their normal route due to localized flooding nr Balbo/State to Wabash.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

Southbound #6 Jackson Park Express buses are temporarily rerouted via State, Harrison, Michigan, and Balbo. then resume their normal route due to localized flooding near Balbo/State to Wabash.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to localized flooding near Balbo/State to Wabash.

Headline: Blue Line Service Delayed near O'Hare
ShortDescription: Blue Line trains are still experiencing delays at O'Hare due to police activity. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Blue Line trains are still experiencing delays at O'Hare due to police activity. 

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

  • As a result of the delay, shuttle buses are available between O'Hare and Rosemont to provide connecting service in both directions.

Personnel are working to restore service. 

Allow extra travel time.
